text: Papa ne aaj khane par announce kar diya ki hum gaon ki zameen bech kar shehar mein bada ghar lenge jahan poori joint family sath rahegi. Jab maine EMI ka bola toh mummy ne rona shuru kar diya ki meri wajah se unka BP badh gaya hai aur 'tumhari wajah se hi ghar mein kalesh hota hai'. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki itne bade karze ke sath main saans kaise loon.

Bina mujhse pooche papa ne mere rishte ke liye haan keh di hai aur bol rahe hain ki ab WFH chhod kar gaon waapas aa jao. Mummy baar-baar bol rahi hain ki parivaar ki izzat mere haath mein hai aur agar maine mana kiya toh wo zeher kha lengi kyunki unka sar samaj mein neecha ho raha hai. Itni ghabrahat aur dukh ho raha hai ki main apna laptop tak nahi khol pa raha, bas siskiyaan nikal rahi hain.

Papa ne decide kiya ki meri salary ka 70% ab seedha chacha ji ke bete ki business mein lagega. Mummy ne taana maara ki meri vajah se unhe roz papa ki dant sunni padti hai aur meri 'career' ki wajah se ghar ka dharam-karam bigad gaya hai. Mera gala rone se bhara hua hai, itni zyada flood of emotions hai ki main agli sprint ki planning ke baare mein soch bhi nahi pa raha.

Aaj subah papa ne announce kiya ki main ab MNC chhod kar gaon mein local sarkari naukri ki taiyari karunga. Mummy ne rona-dhona shuru kar diya ki meri wajah se unka heart kamzor ho gaya hai aur 'log kya kahenge' ki IT mein kaam karne wala beta fail ho gaya. Mujhe itna gussa aur frustration mehsus ho raha hai ki mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas rona hi nikal raha hai.

Bina meri marzi ke papa ne ghar ka renovation shuru karwa diya aur bol rahe hain ki meri savings se payment hogi. Mummy keh rahi hain ki 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai' aur agar maine paise nahi diye toh wo apne maayke chali jayengi. Main poori tarah se toot gaya hoon, bas rona hi aa raha hai aur future bilkul andhera lag raha hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha kaise handle karun.
